articles.title: MAGS ETF: Two Signals Will Determine If the 16% Slide Gets Worse in 2026
articles.summary: The Roundhill Magnificent Seven ETF (MAGS) is down 16% year-to-date, underperforming the Nasdaq 100’s 8% decline, largely due to its equal-weighted structure and divergence among its holdings. The ETF's future performance hinges on two key factors: the trajectory of AI infrastructure spending and whether the weakest link in the portfolio, Tesla, stabilizes its performance. The article highlights the tension between high-performing AI beneficiaries like Nvidia and underperforming components like Tesla within the equal-weighted fund.

articles.title: Tesla’s Robotaxi service found a home in this East Bay city
articles.summary: Tesla's Robotaxi ride-hailing service has established a new hub in downtown Oakland, utilizing the parking garage of the recently completed 1900 Broadway apartment tower by Behring Companies. This marks the second such location in the East Bay for Tesla's service, which launched in the Bay Area last year.

articles.title: Tesla scaling up in Japan with plans to double service centers, more showrooms (TSLA:NASDAQ)
articles.summary: Tesla is set to expand its presence in Japan by doubling its service centers and opening more physical showrooms. This strategic move aims to capture a larger share of the world's third-largest automotive market. The expansion indicates a pivot towards more physical customer touchpoints and increased staffing in the region.
